title: Python prototype validates protocol design
description: Gate for moving to embedded implementation. Python prototype must demonstrate: SCHC compression works, RPL DODAG forms in simulation, CoAP messaging works end-to-end, test vectors generated for Rust/C.
notes: Gate near-complete: SCHC ✓, RPL DODAG formation ✓ (router/dodag + multinode sim tests), Schnorr+link+announce+node ✓, test vectors for Rust/C ✓ (test/vectors/). REMAINING: CoAP messaging end-to-end OVER THE MULTI-HOP MESH (coap works on loopback; not yet wired through SCHC+Node — follow-up lora_ipv6_mesh-eo8 via 1a0). Upstream marked the gate complete in docs (b47d3da); this note records the one integration gap.
